hypothesis: Augmenting AMDEN's training data with short molecular-dynamics relaxation trajectories for each sample and training the score network to denoise along these relaxation pathways will enable the standard (non-HMC) denoising procedure to generate amorphous structures whose post-local-geometry-optimization potential energy distribution is statistically indistinguishable (e.g., KS test p>0.05) from that of annealed reference samples.
